data.body: WS-B2 + WS-B3 DONE + committed (43c8ac1e): linter (ref integrity, closed expr allow-list + expressions=off, injection guard + post-subst invariance/Argo, secret scan) + migrate shim framework. 47 workflow tests green. Next: WS-B4 (rebar workflow new/validate/show CLI + FakeRunner dry-run + 3-step example).
